_meta.description: Round 1 pop baseline. Same content to all models, syntax tuned per model. Locked 2026-05-16.

captions.ace_step: Modern pop track, 108 BPM, sparse R&B-influenced verses with finger snaps and muted electric piano, building to anthemic chorus with stacked vocal harmonies and four-on-the-floor kick drum, female lead vocals with breathy lower register and confident chorus belt, bittersweet but resilient mood, polished radio production with sidechain compression, warm bass, bright top-end
captions.diffrhythm: modern pop, 108 BPM, sparse R&B-influenced verse, finger snaps, muted electric piano, anthemic chorus, stacked vocal harmonies, four-on-the-floor kick drum, female lead vocals, breathy lower register, confident chorus belt, bittersweet but resilient, polished radio production, sidechain compression, warm bass, bright top-end
captions.songgeneration: Modern pop track at 108 BPM. Sparse R&B-influenced verses with finger snaps and muted electric piano, building to anthemic chorus with stacked vocal harmonies and four-on-the-floor kick drum. Female lead vocals with breathy lower register and confident chorus belt. Bittersweet but resilient mood. Polished radio production with sidechain compression, warm bass, and bright top-end.
captions.suno: Modern pop, 108 BPM, R&B-influenced verse, anthemic chorus, female vocals, breathy verse, chorus belt, stacked harmonies, finger snaps, muted electric piano, four-on-the-floor kick, sidechain compression, bittersweet resilient mood, polished radio production, warm bass, bright top-end

lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
I keep your hoodie in the bottom drawer
Half because I miss you and half because I won
You told me I'd come crawling back by Christmas
It's January now and I'm still doing fine

[Pre-Chorus]
Every song they play on the radio
Used to wreck me, used to slow me down

[Chorus]
But I'm not the girl you left behind
I'm not the girl you thought I'd be
I built a life you'd never recognize
And it's better than the one you promised me
I'm not the girl you left behind
I'm not the girl, I'm not the girl

[Verse 2]
My sister asks if I've been sleeping better
I tell her yeah, then sleep right through her call
Your mother sent a card to my apartment
The new one, the one you've never even seen

[Chorus]
But I'm not the girl you left behind
I'm not the girl you thought I'd be
I built a life you'd never recognize
And it's better than the one you promised me
I'm not the girl you left behind
I'm not the girl, I'm not the girl
